problem: Gastroenterology practices need efficient lab ordering and results management for GI-specific tests including H. pylori, Celiac panels, liver function tests, and fecal calprotectin. Fragmented lab systems slow diagnosis and treatment.
solution: Health Gorilla provides a health data network and lab ordering platform that connects GI practices with laboratories nationwide. Their platform enables electronic ordering of GI-related lab tests, automated result delivery, and integration with EHR systems, streamlining the diagnostic workflow for gastroenterology.
